pipeline_status: DCC source candidate pending Step 12 independent audit

coordinate_frame.pivot_role: bottom-center construction datum at ground station; production convention only
coordinate_frame.transform_apply_policy: apply object scale and rotation before audit; mesh data remains in centimeters
coordinate_frame.exact_claim_boundary: targets are authoritative production dimensions; they do not validate one physical source-pixel scale or source transform

vag_coverage.owner_view_or_rule: C-001 -Y/front owner-lane silhouette and profile vertices
C-001 -X/left owner-lane silhouette and profile vertices
owner-lane boundary vertices consumed by four direct planar corner-join facets; no standalone corner sample
C-001 +Z boundary and optional construction-origin fan vertex
minimum C-001 independent bottom cap inside CL-001 overlap
C-002 independent upper masonry tier visible shell
minimum independent C-002 top and bottom caps inside CL-001/CL-002 overlap
C-003 independent lower masonry tier visible shell including K80-bounded CL-003 edge
minimum independent C-003 top and bottom caps inside CL-002/CL-003 overlap
32 by 3 planned N3/K80 transition lattice vertices under R5/R7/R9 owner routing
front and left source-owned irregular apron silhouette anchor vertices, inward-contained by N3
last-to-first q-column closure face using existing endpoint vertices only
flat undecorated Z=0 underside bounded by N3
closure rim vertices required for one-centimeter positive intersection at each contact
source_record_or_interpretation_rule: 127 exact visible contact samples as visibility constraints

c001_owner_view_derivation.formula: same-owner sample rows normalized piecewise linearly; visible row range maps to Z 220..40 cm and maximum observed owner-view span maps to the approved maximum extent; approved contact containment adds Z 35 and hidden Z 34.5 stations

holdout_policy.back: validation only; no construction constants read from back measurements
holdout_policy.right: validation only; no construction constants read from right measurements
